text.title: Take-Home Rubric Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when take-home-rubric-template is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: All reviewers score everything 3/5; the rubric tells nothing.
antipattern.reason: Band anchors missing or vague — reviewers default to centre.
antipattern.note: Fix: Author concrete anchors with example evidence for each band; recalibrate.

antipattern.description: Hiring manager overrides rubric on a single criterion — 'I just felt it'.
antipattern.reason: Threshold not written, so overrides feel cheap.
antipattern.note: Fix: Publish the numeric threshold and require override rationale in the decision log.

antipattern.description: Rubric is changed mid-funnel for 'the next batch'.
antipattern.note: Fix: Bump rubric version; archive old; document change rationale and effective-date.
